However, due to increased coverage from extensions in benefit durations, the duration elasticity of UI benefits rises during recessions. The behavioral effect during the start of the COVID-19 pandemic is substantially lower at all weeks of the unemployment spell.
32071.zh_abstract: 本文利用加州20年的行政索赔和收入数据，估计了失业保险金对劳动力供给结果在整个经济周期中的影响。一个利用非线性福利计划的回归扭结设计，提供了在整个失业期间可随时间比较的行为性劳动力供给反应的实验估计。对于给定的失业持续时间，从2002年到2019年，失业保险金水平对劳动力供给的行为效应在整个经济周期中保持不变。然而，由于福利期限延长带来的覆盖范围增加，失业保险金的持续时间弹性在经济衰退期间上升。在COVID-19疫情开始时，失业期间所有周的行为效应都显著降低。

32070.title: Money Isn’t Everything: Estimating the Prestige Value of Winning Cutthroat Kitchen from Overbidding in Sabotage Auctions
32070.zh_title: 金钱并非一切：从《残酷厨房》破坏拍卖中的过度出价估算获胜声望价值
32070.authors: Meg Snyder, Daniel Bragen, Matthew Rousu, Christopher M. Snyder
32070.abstract: We seek to estimate the prestige value of winning beyond monetary prizes in Cutthroat Kitchen, a cooking show in which dishes are judged in a series of elimination rounds, with the twist that action is periodically paused to auction sabotages against rivals. We estimate the distribution of contestants’ prestige values using a structural model of bidding by a contestant with rational expectations about sabotage effectiveness taken from the data. Our most conservative specification—allowing for risk aversion and bias in the beliefs about sabotage effectiveness—yields mean prestige values of nearly $\$10,000$ for typical episodes and over $\$35,000$ for tournaments.
32070.zh_abstract: 我们试图估算《残酷厨房》中超越金钱奖励的获胜声望价值。这是一档烹饪节目，菜肴在一系列淘汰轮次中接受评判，其独特之处在于比赛会定期暂停，以拍卖针对对手的破坏手段。我们利用一个结构性模型来估算参赛者声望价值的分布，该模型基于参赛者对破坏效果具有理性预期（从数据中获取）的出价行为。我们最保守的设定——允许风险厌恶和对破坏效果信念的偏差——得出典型剧集的平均声望价值接近10,000美元，而锦标赛则超过35,000美元。

32069.title: The Wandering Scholars: Understanding the Heterogeneity of University Commercialization
32069.zh_title: 漫游的学者：理解大学商业化的异质性
32069.authors: Josh Lerner, Henry J. Manley, Carolyn Stein, Heidi L. Williams
32069.abstract: University-based scientific research has long been argued to be a central source of commercial innovation and economic growth. Yet at the same time, there have been long-held concerns that many university-based discoveries never realize their potential social benefits. Looking across universities, research and commercialization activities such as start-up formation vary tremendously – variation that could reflect the composition and orientation of faculty research, university-level factors such as patenting and licensing efforts, or broader place-based factors such as location in a technology cluster. We take a first step towards unpacking this heterogeneity in university commercialization by analyzing how the propensity of academic research to spill over to commercial innovation changes when academics move across universities. Our estimates suggest that at least 15–25% of geographic variation in commercial spillovers from university-based research is attributable to place-specific factors.
32069.zh_abstract: 长期以来，大学科研一直被认为是商业创新和经济增长的核心来源。然而，与此同时，人们长期担忧许多大学发现从未实现其潜在的社会效益。纵观各大学，诸如初创企业形成等研究和商业化活动差异巨大——这种差异可能反映了教师研究的构成和方向、专利和许可努力等大学层面因素，或更广泛的地区因素，例如位于技术集群中。我们通过分析学术研究溢出到商业创新的倾向在学者跨大学流动时如何变化，迈出了解析大学商业化异质性的第一步。我们的估计表明，大学研究商业溢出中至少15%至25%的地理差异可归因于地区特定因素。

32068.title: Principal Component Analysis for a Mix of Stationary and Nonstationary Variables
32068.zh_title: 混合平稳与非平稳变量的主成分分析
32068.authors: James D. Hamilton, Xinwei Ma, Jin Xi
32068.abstract: This paper develops a procedure for uncovering the common cyclical factors that drive a mix of stationary and nonstationary variables. The method does not require knowing which variables are nonstationary or the nature of the nonstationarity. An application to the FREDMD macroeconomic dataset demonstrates that the approach offers similar benefits to those of traditional principal component analysis with some added advantages.
32068.zh_abstract: 本文开发了一种程序，用于揭示驱动混合平稳和非平稳变量的共同周期因子。该方法不需要知道哪些变量是非平稳的，也不需要知道非平稳性的性质。对FREDMD宏观经济数据集的应用表明，该方法提供了与传统主成分分析类似的益处，并具有一些额外优势。

32067.title: Age at Immigrant Arrival and Career Mobility: Evidence from Vietnamese Refugee Migration and the Amerasian Homecoming Act
32067.zh_title: 移民到达年龄与职业流动性：来自越南难民迁移和《美亚混血儿返乡法》的证据
32067.authors: Sari Pekkala Kerr, William R. Kerr, Kendall E. Smith
32067.abstract: We study the long-term career mobility of young immigrants, mostly refugees, from Vietnam who moved to the US during 1989-1995. This migration wave was sparked by unexpected events, culminating in the 1987 Amerasian Homecoming Act. Characteristics of the wave minimized selection effects regarding who migrated. Small differences in the age at arrival, specifically being 14-17 years old on entry compared to 18-21, resulted in substantial differences in future economic outcomes. Using Census Bureau data, we characterize the different career profiles of young vs. older immigrants, and we quantify explanatory factors like education, language fluency, and persistence from initial employers.
32067.zh_abstract: 我们研究了1989年至1995年间移居美国的越南年轻移民（主要是难民）的长期职业流动性。这次移民浪潮由意外事件引发，最终以1987年的《美亚混血儿返乡法》告终。该浪潮的特征最小化了关于谁迁移的选择效应。到达年龄的微小差异，特别是14至17岁入境与18至21岁相比，导致了未来经济结果的显著差异。利用人口普查局数据，我们刻画了年轻移民与年长移民的不同职业轨迹，并量化了教育、语言流利度和初始雇主的持续性等解释因素。
32067.meta: Programs：DAE, LS, PE, PR；JEL：F22, J15, J44, J61, J71, L26, M13, M51

32066.title: Deadlines Versus Continuous Incentives: Evidence from the Patent Office
32066.zh_title: 截止日期与持续激励：来自专利局的证据
32066.authors: Michael D. Frakes, Melissa F. Wasserman
32066.abstract: A quota system with an associated deadline may retain the possibility of worker procrastination and related deadline behaviors. A performance appraisal system based on continuous temporal incentives, on the other hand, has the potential to alleviate deadline effects but may lose some of the quality-related benefits associated with the flexibility of a quota/deadline system. We explore these tradeoffs by observing patent examiner behavior and examination quality outcomes surrounding a 2011 reform at the U.S. Patent and Trademark Office that built on its bi-weekly quota system by adding a set of bonuses tied to daily examination-pendency measures. We find a substantial reduction in deadline effects and near complete temporal smoothing in examiner behavior in connection with the reform, leading to large reductions in average examination pendency while resulting in no corresponding reductions in the accuracy of examinations.
32066.zh_abstract: 带有相关截止日期的配额制度可能保留工人拖延及相关截止日期行为的可能性。另一方面，基于持续时间激励的绩效评估系统有可能减轻截止日期效应，但可能失去与配额/截止日期系统灵活性相关的一些质量益处。我们通过观察美国专利商标局2011年改革前后专利审查员的行为和审查质量结果来探讨这些权衡，该改革在其双周配额制度基础上增加了与每日审查待决时间指标挂钩的一系列奖金。我们发现，与改革相关，审查员行为中的截止日期效应显著减少，时间分布几乎完全平滑，导致平均审查待决时间大幅缩短，同时审查准确性没有相应下降。

32065.title: Regularization from Economic Constraints: A New Estimator for Marginal Emissions
32065.zh_title: 来自经济约束的正则化：一种新的边际排放估计量
32065.authors: Stephen P. Holland, Erin T. Mansur, Valentin Verdier, Andrew J. Yates
32065.abstract: Environmental policy is increasingly concerned with measuring emissions resulting from local changes to electricity consumption. These marginal emissions are challenging to measure because electricity grids encompass multiple locations and the information available to identify the effect of each location’s consumption on grid-wide emissions is limited. We formalize this as a high-dimensional aggregation problem: The effect of electricity consumption on emissions can be estimated precisely for each electricity generating unit (generator), but not precisely enough to obtain reliable estimates of marginal emissions by summing these effects across all generators in a grid. We study how two economic constraints can address this problem: electricity supply equals demand and an assumption of monotonicity. We show that these constraints can be used to formulate a ‘naturally regularized’ estimator, which implements an implicit penalization that does not need to be directly tuned. Under an additional assumption of sparsity, we show that our new estimator solves the high-dimensional aggregation problem, i.e., it is consistent for marginal emissions where the usual regression estimator would not be. We also develop an asymptotically valid method for inference to accompany our estimator. When applied to the U.S. electricity grid with 13 separate consumption regions, our method yields plausible patterns of marginal generation across fuel types and geographic location. Our estimates of region-level marginal emissions are precise, account for imports/exports between regions, and allow for all fuel types to potentially be on the margin.
32065.zh_abstract: 环境政策越来越关注衡量当地电力消费变化所产生的排放。这些边际排放难以衡量，因为电网涵盖多个地点，且可用于识别每个地点消费对电网范围排放影响的信息有限。我们将此形式化为一个高维加总问题：电力消费对排放的影响可以针对每个发电机组精确估计，但不足以通过将所有发电机组的这些影响相加来获得可靠的边际排放估计。我们研究了两种经济约束如何解决这个问题：电力供给等于需求以及单调性假设。我们表明，这些约束可用于制定一个“自然正则化”的估计量，该估计量实施了一种无需直接调整的隐式惩罚。在额外的稀疏性假设下，我们证明新估计量解决了高维加总问题，即它在通常的回归估计量无法做到的情况下对边际排放是一致的。我们还为我们的估计量开发了一种渐近有效的推断方法。当应用于拥有13个独立消费区域的美国电网时，我们的方法得出了跨燃料类型和地理位置的边际发电的合理模式。我们对区域级边际排放的估计是精确的，考虑了区域间的进出口，并允许所有燃料类型都可能处于边际。

32064.title: What Do Shareholders Want? Consumer Welfare and the Objective of the Firm
32064.zh_title: 股东想要什么？消费者福利与公司目标
32064.abstract: Shareholders want a firm’s objective function to place some weight on consumer welfare, motivated by both self-interest and altruism. Firms have a unique technology for improving consumer welfare: lowering inefficient price markups. Optimal pricing formulas can account for shareholders’ marginal rate of substitution between profits and consumer welfare. Calibrations show shareholders should place non-trivial weights on consumers. A survey experiment with a representative sample shows how shareholders would vote on resolutions giving strategic guidance to firms. Only 7% would vote for pure profit maximization. The median individual is indifferent between $\$0.44$ in profits or $\$1$ in consumer surplus.
32064.zh_abstract: 股东希望公司的目标函数在一定程度上重视消费者福利，其动机既包括自利也包括利他。公司拥有改善消费者福利的独特技术：降低低效的价格加成。最优定价公式可以解释股东在利润和消费者福利之间的边际替代率。校准显示股东应对消费者赋予非平凡的权重。一项针对代表性样本的调查实验展示了股东如何对向公司提供战略指导的决议进行投票。只有7%的人会投票支持纯粹的利润最大化。中位数个体在0.44美元利润或1美元消费者剩余之间无差异。
32064.meta: Programs：CF, EEE, IO, LE；JEL：D21, D91, G30, L21, M14

32063.title: Cool cities: The value of urban trees
32063.zh_title: 凉爽城市：城市树木的价值
32063.authors: Lu Han, Stephan Heblich, Christopher Timmins, Yanos Zylberberg
32063.abstract: This paper estimates the value of urban trees and shows their ability to moderate temperatures during heatwaves and reduce energy consumption. The empirical strategy exploits an ecological catastrophe—the Emerald Ash Borer infestation in Toronto—to isolate exogenous variation in neighborhood tree canopy changes and finds that a single tree adds 0.45% to property prices within a postal code; the hardest-hit areas lost 7 percentage points in tree canopy cover, resulting in a 7% property price decline. Trees significantly cool urban areas and save energy, but their total amenity value surpasses the value of these ecosystem services, highlighting their cost-effectiveness in combating urban heat island effects.
32063.zh_abstract: 本文估计了城市树木的价值，并展示了它们在热浪期间调节温度和减少能源消耗的能力。实证策略利用了一场生态灾难——多伦多的翡翠灰螟虫害——来隔离社区树冠变化的 exogenous 变异，并发现单棵树使邮政编码区域内的房产价格增加0.45%；受灾最严重的地区树冠覆盖率下降了7个百分点，导致房产价格下降7%。树木显著降低了城市温度并节省了能源，但其总舒适价值超过了这些生态系统服务的价值，突显了它们在应对城市热岛效应方面的成本效益。

32062.title: Technology and the Global Economy
32062.abstract: Interpreting individual heterogeneity in terms of probability theory has proved powerful in connecting behaviour at the individual and aggregate levels. Returning to Ricardo's focus on comparative efficiency as a basis for international trade, much recent quantitative equilibrium modeling of the global economy builds on particular probabilistic assumptions about technology. We review these assumptions and how they deliver a unified framework underlying a wide range of static and dynamic equilibrium models.
32062.zh_abstract: 用概率论解释个体异质性已被证明在连接个体和总体层面的行为方面非常有效。回归李嘉图将比较效率作为国际贸易基础的关注点，许多近期关于全球经济的定量均衡模型建立在关于技术的特定概率假设之上。我们回顾了这些假设，以及它们如何为广泛的静态和动态均衡模型提供一个统一的框架。

32061.title: The (Unexpected) Gender Minority Gap in Confidence
32061.zh_title: （意料之外的）性别少数群体在自信方面的差距
32061.authors: Billur Aksoy, Christine L. Exley, Judd B. Kessler
32061.abstract: An increasing share of the population identifies their gender in a way other than as a man or woman. Yet, there is little work on beliefs about these gender minorities. We find that subjects, while relatively certain about the traits of men and women, are uncertain about the confidence, competitiveness, risk aversion, and generosity of gender minorities. Despite this uncertainty about gender minorities, however, we find that gender minorities are less confident than equally-performing men, resulting in a gender minority gap that is just as large as the gender gap in confidence between men and women.
32061.zh_abstract: 越来越多的人口以非男性或女性的方式认同自己的性别。然而，关于对这些性别少数群体的信念的研究却很少。我们发现，虽然受试者对男性和女性的特质相对确定，但他们对于性别少数群体的自信、竞争性、风险规避和慷慨程度并不确定。然而，尽管存在这种对性别少数群体的不确定性，我们发现性别少数群体比表现相同的男性更不自信，这导致性别少数群体在自信方面的差距与男性和女性之间的性别差距一样大。

32060.title: The Changing Nature of Pollution, Income, and Environmental Inequality in the United States
32060.zh_title: 美国污染、收入与环境不平等的性质变化
32060.authors: Jonathan M. Colmer, Suvy Qin, John L. Voorheis, Reed Walker
32060.abstract: This paper uses administrative tax records linked to Census demographic data and high-resolution measures of fine small particulate (PM2.5) exposure to study the evolution of the Black-White pollution exposure gap over the past 40 years. In doing so, we focus on the various ways in which income may have contributed to these changes using a statistical decomposition. We decompose the overall change in the Black-White PM2.5 exposure gap into (1) components that stem from rank-preserving compression in the overall pollution distribution and (2) changes that stem from a reordering of Black and White households within the pollution distribution. We find a significant narrowing of the Black-White PM2.5 exposure gap over this time period that is overwhelmingly driven by rank-preserving changes rather than positional changes. However, the relative positions of Black and White households at the upper end of the pollution distribution have meaningfully shifted in the most recent years.
32060.zh_abstract: 本文利用与人口普查人口统计数据相关联的行政税务记录以及细颗粒物（PM2.5）暴露的高分辨率测量数据，研究了过去40年间黑人与白人之间污染暴露差距的演变。在此过程中，我们使用统计分解方法，重点关注收入可能以各种方式促成这些变化。我们将黑人与白人PM2.5暴露差距的总体变化分解为：（1）源于整个污染分布中保持排序的压缩部分，以及（2）源于黑人和白人家庭在污染分布中重新排序的变化。我们发现，在此期间黑人与白人PM2.5暴露差距显著缩小，这主要是由保持排序的变化而非位置变化驱动的。然而，在最近几年，位于污染分布上端的黑人和白人家庭的相对位置发生了有意义的转变。

32059.title: Quantifying the Social Value of a Universal COVID-19 Vaccine and Incentivizing Its Development
32059.zh_title: 量化通用COVID-19疫苗的社会价值并激励其开发
32059.authors: Rachel Glennerster, Thomas Kelly, Claire T. McMahon, Christopher M. Snyder
32059.abstract: A booster of the COVID-19 vaccine targeting the prevailing Omicron variant did not become available in the United States until a year after the variant was first detected. This pattern of developing, testing, and distributing a variant-specific booster may become the default response to further waves of COVID-19 caused by new variants. An innovation with realistic scientific potential—a universal COVID-19 vaccine, effective against existing and future variants—could provide much more value by preempting new variants. Averaged across Monte Carlo simulations, we estimate the incremental value to the U.S. population of a universal COVID-19 vaccine to be $\$1.5$–$\$2.6$ trillion greater than variant-specific boosters (depending on how the arrival rate of variants is modeled). This social value eclipses the cost of an advance market commitment to incentivize the universal vaccine by several orders of magnitude.
32059.zh_abstract: 针对流行奥密克戎变异株的COVID-19疫苗加强针直到该变异株首次被检测到一年后才在美国上市。这种开发、测试和分发针对特定变异株加强针的模式，可能成为应对由新变异株引起的进一步COVID-19浪潮的默认反应。一项具有现实科学潜力的创新——一种能有效对抗现有和未来变异株的通用COVID-19疫苗——可以通过先发制人地应对新变异株来提供更大的价值。在蒙特卡洛模拟的平均值下，我们估计通用COVID-19疫苗对美国人口的增量价值比特异性变异株加强针高出1.5至2.6万亿美元（取决于变异株到达率的建模方式）。这一社会价值比用于激励通用疫苗的预先市场承诺成本高出几个数量级。
32059.meta: Programs：EH, IO, PE, PR；JEL：H51, I18, L65

32058.title: Do Earmarks Target Low-Income and Minority Communities? Evidence from US Drinking Water
32058.zh_title: 专项拨款是否针对低收入和少数族裔社区？来自美国饮用水的证据
32058.authors: David A. Keiser, Bhashkar Mazumder, David Molitor, Joseph S. Shapiro, Brant J. Walker
32058.abstract: The quality and inequality of US drinking water investments have gained attention after recent environmental disasters in Flint, Michigan, and elsewhere. We compare the formula-based targeting of subsidized loans provided under the Safe Drinking Water Act with the targeting of congressional drinking water earmarks (“pork barrel” spending). Earmarks are often critiqued for potentially privileging wealthier and more politically connected communities. We find that earmarks target Black, Hispanic, and low-income communities, partly due to targeting water systems serving large populations. Earmark and loan targeting differ significantly across all the demographics we analyze. Compared to Safe Drinking Water Act loans, earmarks disproportionately target Hispanic communities but not Black or low-income communities.
32058.zh_abstract: 在密歇根州弗林特等地最近发生环境灾难后，美国饮用水投资的质量和不平等问题引起了关注。我们比较了《安全饮用水法》下基于公式的补贴贷款分配与国会饮用水专项拨款（“猪肉桶”支出）的分配。专项拨款常因可能偏袒更富裕和更具政治关联的社区而受到批评。我们发现，专项拨款针对黑人、西班牙裔和低收入社区，部分原因是其针对服务大量人口的水务系统。在我们分析的所有人口统计特征中，专项拨款和贷款分配存在显著差异。与《安全饮用水法》贷款相比，专项拨款不成比例地针对西班牙裔社区，但不针对黑人或低收入社区。
32058.meta: Programs：EEE, EH, LS, PE, POL；JEL：H2, I1, P0, Q5

32057.title: The Anatomy of Concentration: New Evidence From a Unified Framework
32057.zh_title: 集中度的剖析：来自统一框架的新证据
32057.authors: Kenneth R. Ahern, Lei Kong, Xinyan Yan
32057.abstract: Concentration is a single summary statistic driven by two opposing forces: the number of firms in a market and the evenness of their market shares. This paper introduces a generalized measure of concentration that allows researchers to vary the relative importance of each force. Using the generalized measure, we show that the widely-cited evidence of increasing industrial employment concentration is driven by the Herfindahl Index's over-weighting of evenness and under-weighting of firm counts. We propose an alternative, equally-weighted measure that has an equivalent economic meaning as the Herfindahl Index, but possesses superior statistical attributes in typical firm size distributions. Using this balanced measure, we find that employment concentration decreased from 1990 to 2020. Finally, decomposing aggregate diversity into meaningful geographic and industry subdivisions reveals that concentration within regional markets has fallen, while concentration between markets has risen.
32057.zh_abstract: 集中度是一个单一的汇总统计量，由两种相反的力量驱动：市场中的企业数量及其市场份额的均匀程度。本文引入了一种广义的集中度衡量指标，允许研究人员改变每种力量的相对重要性。使用该广义指标，我们表明，被广泛引用的工业就业集中度上升的证据，是由赫芬达尔指数过度加权均匀性而低估企业数量所驱动的。我们提出了一种替代的、等权重的衡量指标，该指标与赫芬达尔指数具有同等的经济含义，但在典型的企业规模分布中具有更优越的统计属性。使用这种平衡的衡量指标，我们发现就业集中度从1990年到2020年有所下降。最后，将总体多样性分解为有意义的地理和行业细分，揭示出区域市场内的集中度下降，而市场之间的集中度上升。

32056.title: Capital, Ideas, and the Costs of Financial Frictions
32056.zh_title: 资本、思想与金融摩擦的成本
32056.abstract: We study the role of financial frictions in determining the allocation of investment and innovation. Empirically, we find that established firms are investment-intensive when they have low net worth but become innovation-intensive as they accumulate net worth. To interpret these findings, we develop an endogenous growth model with heterogeneous firms and financial frictions. In our model, firms are investment-intensive when they have low net worth because their returns to capital are high. Financial frictions determine the rate at which firms drive down the returns to capital and shift towards innovation. Quantitatively, the aggregate losses due to lower innovation are large, even though the allocation of capital to existing ideas is comparatively efficient. If innovation has positive spillovers, a planner would lower investment among constrained firms to finance more innovation. An innovation subsidy does not generate the correct distribution of investment and innovation to exactly decentralize this outcome.
32056.zh_abstract: 我们研究了金融摩擦在决定投资和创新配置中的作用。实证上，我们发现成熟企业在净资产较低时是投资密集型的，但随着净资产的积累，它们会转向创新密集型。为了解释这些发现，我们构建了一个包含异质性企业和金融摩擦的内生增长模型。在我们的模型中，企业在净资产较低时是投资密集型的，因为它们的资本回报率很高。金融摩擦决定了企业压低资本回报率并转向创新的速度。定量上，尽管资本在现有思想上的配置相对有效，但由于创新减少导致的总体损失是巨大的。如果创新具有正外部性，计划者会减少受约束企业的投资，以资助更多的创新。创新补贴并不能产生正确的投资和创新分布来完全分散化这一结果。
32056.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, PR；JEL：E22, E23, G3, O30, O4

32055.title: Addiction, Thick Market Externalities, and the Persistence of the Opioid Epidemic
32055.zh_title: 成瘾、厚市场外部性与阿片类药物流行的持续性
32055.authors: David M. Cutler, J. Travis Donahoe
32055.abstract: U.S. opioid overdose death rates rose nearly continuously from 1990 to 2022, claiming over 750,000 lives. The persistence of the epidemic is surprising, as policy and behavioral responses to the epidemic would be expected to reduce harm. We examine four explanations for why death rates instead rose so greatly and for so long: exogenous and continuing increases in demand or supply of opioids, dynamic spillovers stemming from prescription opioid addiction, and spatial spillovers due to thick market externalities. We find that spillovers across time and space are the main explanation. Without them, there would have been 88 percent fewer deaths.
32055.zh_abstract: 美国阿片类药物过量死亡率从1990年到2022年几乎持续上升，夺走了超过75万人的生命。这种流行病的持续性令人惊讶，因为针对该流行病的政策和行为反应本应减少危害。我们考察了四种解释，说明为什么死亡率反而如此之大且持续了这么久：阿片类药物需求或供给的外生持续增长、由处方阿片类药物成瘾引发的动态溢出效应，以及由于厚市场外部性导致的空间溢出效应。我们发现，跨时间和跨空间的溢出效应是主要解释。如果没有它们，死亡人数将减少88%。

32054.title: Stacked Difference-in-Differences
32054.authors: Coady Wing, Seth M. Freedman, Alex Hollingsworth
32054.abstract: This paper introduces the concept of a "trimmed aggregate ATT," which is a weighted average of a set of group-time average treatment effect on the treated (ATT) parameters identified in a staggered adoption difference-in-differences (DID) design. The set of identified group-time ATTs that contribute to the aggregate is trimmed to achieve compositional balance across an event window, ensuring that comparisons of the aggregate parameter over event time reveal dynamic treatment effects and differential pre-trends rather than compositional changes. Taking the trimmed aggregate ATT as a target parameter, we investigate the performance of stacked DID estimators. We show that the most basic stacked estimator does not identify the target aggregate or any other average causal effect because it applies different implicit weights to treatment and control trends. The bias can be eliminated using corrective sample weights. We present a weighted stacked DID estimator, and show that it correctly identifies the target aggregate, providing justification for using the estimator in applied work.
32054.zh_abstract: 本文引入了“修剪后的汇总ATT”概念，它是在交错采用的双重差分（DID）设计中识别出的一组组-时间平均处理效应（ATT）参数的加权平均值。对构成该汇总指标的已识别组-时间ATT集合进行修剪，以实现在事件窗口内的组成平衡，确保汇总参数在事件时间上的比较揭示的是动态处理效应和差异化事前趋势，而非组成变化。以修剪后的汇总ATT为目标参数，我们研究了堆叠DID估计量的表现。我们表明，最基本的堆叠估计量无法识别目标汇总指标或任何其他平均因果效应，因为它对处理组和对照组趋势施加了不同的隐含权重。这种偏差可以通过使用校正样本权重来消除。我们提出了一个加权堆叠DID估计量，并表明它能正确识别目标汇总指标，从而为在应用研究中使用该估计量提供了依据。

32053.title: Central Banks, Stock Markets, and the Real Economy
32053.zh_title: 中央银行、股票市场与实体经济
32053.abstract: This article summarizes empirical research on the interaction between monetary policy and asset markets, and reviews our previous theoretical work that captures these interactions. We present a concise model in which monetary policy impacts the aggregate asset price, which in turn influences economic activity with lags. In this context: (i) the central bank (the Fed, for short) stabilizes the aggregate asset price in response to financial shocks, using large-scale asset purchases if needed ("the Fed put"); (ii) when the Fed is constrained, negative financial shocks cause demand recessions, (iii) the Fed's response to aggregate demand shocks increases asset price volatility, but this volatility plays a useful macroeconomic stabilization role; (iv) the Fed's beliefs about the future aggregate demand and supply drive the aggregate asset price; (v) macroeconomic news influences the Fed's beliefs and asset prices; (vi) more precise news reduces output volatility but heightens asset market volatility; (vii) disagreements between the market and the Fed microfound monetary policy shocks, and generate a policy risk premium.
32053.zh_abstract: 本文总结了关于货币政策与资产市场之间互动的实证研究，并回顾了我们先前捕捉这些互动的理论工作。我们提出了一个简洁模型，其中货币政策影响总体资产价格，而资产价格又滞后地影响经济活动。在此背景下：(i) 中央银行（简称美联储）通过应对金融冲击来稳定总体资产价格，必要时使用大规模资产购买（即“美联储看跌期权”）；(ii) 当美联储受到约束时，负面金融冲击会导致需求衰退；(iii) 美联储对总需求冲击的反应增加了资产价格波动性，但这种波动性发挥了有益的宏观经济稳定作用；(iv) 美联储对未来总需求和总供给的信念驱动着总体资产价格；(v) 宏观经济新闻影响美联储的信念和资产价格；(vi) 更精确的新闻降低了产出波动性，但加剧了资产市场波动性；(vii) 市场与美联储之间的分歧为货币政策冲击提供了微观基础，并产生了政策风险溢价。
32053.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, ME；JEL：E32, E43, E44, E52, G12

32052.title: Tech-Driven Intermediation in the Originate-to-Distribute Model
32052.zh_title: 发起-分销模式中的技术驱动型中介
32052.authors: Zhiguo He, Sheila Jiang, Douglas Xu
32052.abstract: This paper develops a general equilibrium model to examine the role of information technology when intermediaries facilitate the origination and distribution of assets given information asymmetry. Information technology measures the informativeness of asset-quality signals received by intermediaries, who purchase assets produced by originators and then resell them to uninformed investors. Allowing intermediaries to operate has a mixed social welfare effect: Uninformed intermediation can be welfare reducing when adverse selection is severe in the economy, while informed intermediation always improves social welfare.
32052.zh_abstract: 本文构建了一个一般均衡模型，以研究在信息不对称条件下，当中介机构促进资产的发起和分销时，信息技术所扮演的角色。信息技术衡量了中介机构收到的资产质量信号的信息含量，这些中介机构从发起人处购买资产，然后将其转售给不知情的投资者。允许中介机构运营会产生混合的社会福利效应：当经济中逆向选择严重时，不知情的中介可能降低福利，而知情的中介则始终改善社会福利。
32052.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IO；JEL：D52, D82, G21, G23, O33

32051.title: Sorting under Risk Sharing and Complementarities
32051.zh_title: 风险分担与互补性下的匹配
32051.abstract: How does the presence of risk sharing affect sorting patterns on productive attributes when there are complementarities among partners' skills in match output? We develop a matching model in which risk-averse agents, who differ in skills, match pairwise for productive purposes. Match output has stochastic returns and matched partners efficiently share this risk. We find that under plausible assumptions the risk-sharing benefit of marriage tends to push toward negative sorting on partners' skills. To obtain the prediction of positive skill sorting—a robust empirical feature of marriage markets—this force needs to be counteracted by sufficiently strong skill complementarities in match output. We provide a novel inequality that characterizes monotone (positive or negative) equilibrium sorting, balancing out skill complementarities and risk-sharing considerations in the right way. Several classes of primitives (utility and match output functions) render monotone sorting optimal. We then highlight a new implication of positive sorting on exogenous skills for matching patterns on endogenous differences in risk aversion: Positive sorting on skills translates into positive sorting on risk aversion—in line with the evidence from marriage markets.
32051.zh_abstract: 当匹配产出中伴侣技能存在互补性时，风险分担的存在如何影响基于生产性属性的匹配模式？我们构建了一个匹配模型，其中风险厌恶的代理人（技能各异）为生产目的进行两两匹配。匹配产出具有随机回报，匹配的伴侣有效分担这一风险。我们发现，在合理假设下，婚姻的风险分担收益倾向于推动伴侣技能之间的负向匹配。为了得到正向技能匹配的预测——这是婚姻市场的一个稳健经验特征——这一力量需要被匹配产出中足够强的技能互补性所抵消。我们提出一个新的不等式，该不等式以恰当方式平衡技能互补性和风险分担考量，从而刻画了单调（正向或负向）均衡匹配。几类原始函数（效用函数和匹配产出函数）使得单调匹配成为最优。然后，我们强调了外生技能的正向匹配对风险厌恶内生差异的匹配模式的一个新含义：技能的正向匹配转化为风险厌恶的正向匹配——这与婚姻市场的证据一致。

32050.title: The Economics of Information in a World of Disinformation: A Survey Part 2: Direct Communication
32050.zh_title: 虚假信息世界中的信息经济学：综述 第二部分：直接沟通
32050.abstract: The paper surveys the recent work on economics of information with endogenous information structures where individuals can directly communicate information with each other. We consider the theoretical work on cheap talk, Bayesian persuasion, and information design, and review the implications of information control and information abundance for mis and disinformation. The relationship between information and market power is particularly important when social media can amplify and maintain harmful fictions that lead to polarization and undermine not only markets, but democratic discourse. We review both the “rational” decision-making paradigm, as well as departures from it, such as cases where decision makers can choose what to know, can allocate their attention in different ways or have behavioral biases that influence their information processing. We note some important connections to legal and media studies and highlight key messages in nontechnical language.
32050.zh_abstract: 本文综述了近期关于内生信息结构下信息经济学的研究，其中个体可以直接相互沟通信息。我们考虑了关于廉价谈话、贝叶斯说服和信息设计的理论工作，并回顾了信息控制和信息丰富对错误信息和虚假信息的影响。当社交媒体能够放大并维持有害的虚构信息，导致两极分化并不仅破坏市场，还破坏民主话语时，信息与市场力量之间的关系尤为重要。我们既回顾了“理性”决策范式，也回顾了对其的偏离，例如决策者可以选择知道什么、以不同方式分配注意力或存在影响其信息处理的行为偏差的情况。我们指出了与法律和媒体研究的一些重要联系，并用非技术性语言强调了关键信息。

32049.title: The Economics of Information in a World of Disinformation: A Survey Part 1: Indirect Communication
32049.zh_title: 虚假信息世界中的信息经济学：综述 第一部分：间接沟通
32049.abstract: We survey aspects of the intellectual development of the economics of information from the 1970s to today. We focus here on models where information is communicated indirectly through actions. Basic results, such as the failure of the fundamental theorems of welfare economics, the non-existence of competitive equilibrium, and the dependence of the nature of the equilibrium, when it exists, on both what information is available, and how information can be acquired, have been shown to be robust. Markets create asymmetries of information, even when initially none existed. While the earliest literature paid scarce attention to misinformation, subsequently it has been shown that governments can improve welfare, if disinformation is present, through fraud laws and disclosure requirements. Moreover, robust mechanism design enables agents and governments to better achieve their objectives, taking into account information asymmetries. On the other hand, market reforms that ignored their informational consequences may have lowered welfare. Surveying both theory and applications, we review the main insights of these literatures, and highlight key messages using nontechnical language.
32049.zh_abstract: 我们综述了从20世纪70年代至今信息经济学智力发展的若干方面。我们在此聚焦于信息通过行动间接沟通的模型。基本结果，例如福利经济学基本定理的失效、竞争均衡的不存在性，以及均衡（当存在时）的性质既取决于可获得的信息又取决于信息获取方式，已被证明是稳健的。市场会创造信息不对称，即使最初并不存在。尽管早期文献很少关注错误信息，但随后研究表明，如果存在虚假信息，政府可以通过欺诈法律和披露要求来改善福利。此外，稳健的机制设计使代理人和政府能够在考虑信息不对称的情况下更好地实现其目标。另一方面，忽视信息后果的市场改革可能降低了福利。通过综述理论和应用，我们回顾了这些文献的主要见解，并用非技术性语言强调了关键信息。

32048.title: Digital Information Provision and Behavior Change: Lessons from Six Experiments in East Africa
32048.zh_title: 数字信息提供与行为改变：来自东非六项实验的教训
32048.authors: Raissa Fabregas, Michael Kremer, Matthew Lowes, Robert On, Giulia Zane
32048.abstract: Mobile phone-based informational programs are widely used worldwide, though there is little consensus on how effective they are at changing behavior. We present causal evidence on the effects of six agricultural information programs delivered through text messages in Kenya and Rwanda. The programs shared similar objectives but were implemented by three different organizations and varied in content, design, and target population. With administrative outcome data for tens of thousands of farmers across all experiments, we are sufficiently powered to detect small effects in real input purchase choices. Combining the results of all experiments through a meta-analysis, we find that the odds ratio for following the recommendations is 1.22 (95% CI: 1.16, 1.29). We cannot reject that impacts are similar across experiments and for two different agricultural inputs. There is little evidence of message fatigue, but the effects diminish over time. Providing more granular information, supplementing the texts with in-person calls, or varying the messages’ framing did not significantly increase impacts, but message repetition had modest positive effects. While the overall effect sizes are small, the low cost of text messages can make these programs cost-effective.
32048.zh_abstract: 基于手机的信息项目在世界范围内广泛使用，但关于它们在改变行为方面效果如何，尚无共识。我们提供了肯尼亚和卢旺达通过短信提供的六项农业信息项目效果的因果证据。这些项目目标相似，但由三个不同组织实施，并在内容、设计和目标人群上有所不同。利用所有实验中数万名农民的行政结果数据，我们有足够的统计功效来检测实际投入购买选择中的微小效应。通过荟萃分析综合所有实验结果，我们发现遵循建议的比值比为1.22（95%置信区间：1.16, 1.29）。我们不能拒绝各实验之间以及两种不同农业投入品的影响相似的假设。几乎没有信息疲劳的证据，但效果随时间减弱。提供更细化的信息、用电话补充短信或改变信息框架并未显著增加影响，但信息重复有适度的正向效果。尽管总体效应量较小，但短信的低成本可能使这些项目具有成本效益。

32047.title: Using Satellite Imagery to Detect the Impacts of New Highways: An Application to India
32047.zh_title: 利用卫星图像检测新高速公路的影响：以印度为例
32047.authors: Kathryn Baragwanath Vogel, Gordon H. Hanson, Amit Khandelwal, Chen Liu, Hogeun Park
32047.abstract: This paper integrates daytime and nighttime satellite imagery into a spatial general-equilibrium model to evaluate the returns to investments in new motorways. Our approach has particular value in developing-country settings in which spatially granular economic data are scarce. To demonstrate our method, we use publicly available imagery to evaluate India’s road construction projects in the early 2000s. Estimating the model and evaluating welfare impacts only requires remotely-sensed data. We find that India’s road investments improved aggregate welfare, particularly for the largest and smallest urban markets. Most welfare gains accrued within Indian districts—the unit of analysis in conventional approaches—which demonstrates the benefits of using of high-resolution satellite imagery.
32047.zh_abstract: 本文将白天和夜间卫星图像整合到一个空间一般均衡模型中，以评估新高速公路投资的回报。我们的方法在空间粒度经济数据稀缺的发展中国家环境中具有特殊价值。为展示我们的方法，我们使用公开可用的图像来评估印度21世纪初的道路建设项目。仅需遥感数据即可估计模型并评估福利影响。我们发现，印度的道路投资改善了总体福利，尤其是对最大和最小的城市市场。大多数福利收益发生在印度地区内部——这是传统分析方法中的分析单位——这证明了使用高分辨率卫星图像的好处。

32096.title: Intra-Household Insurance and the Intergenerational Transmission of Income Risk
32096.zh_title: 家庭内部保险与收入风险的代际传递
32096.authors: Francesco Agostinelli, Domenico Ferraro, Xincheng Qiu, Giuseppe Sorrenti
32096.abstract: This paper studies the mechanisms and the extent to which parental wage risk passes through to children's skill development. Through a quantitative dynamic labor supply model in which two parents choose whether to work short or long hours or not work at all, time spent with children, and child-related expenditures, we find that income risk impacts skill accumulation, permanently lowering children's skill levels. To the extent that making up for cognitive skill losses during childhood is hard--as available evidence suggests--uninsurable income risk can negatively impact the labor market prospects of future generations.
32096.zh_abstract: 本文研究了父母工资风险传递给子女技能发展的机制及其程度。通过一个定量动态劳动供给模型，其中两位父母选择是否工作短时间、长时间或不工作，以及选择与子女相处的时间和子女相关支出，我们发现收入风险会影响技能积累，永久性地降低子女的技能水平。鉴于童年时期认知技能损失的弥补是困难的——正如现有证据所表明的那样——不可保险的收入风险可能对后代的劳动力市场前景产生负面影响。

32095.title: Do Double Majors Face Less Risk? An Analysis of Human Capital Diversification
32095.zh_title: 双专业面临的风险更小吗？人力资本多样化的分析
32095.authors: Andrew S. Hanks, Shengjun Jiang, Xuechao Qian, Bo Wang, Bruce A. Weinberg
32095.abstract: We study how human capital diversification, in the form of double majoring, affects the response of earnings to labor market shocks. Double majors experience substantial protection against earnings shocks, of 56%. This finding holds across different model specifications and data sets. Furthermore, the protection double majors experience is more pronounced when the two majors are more distantly related, highlighting the importance of diverse skill sets. Additional analyses demonstrate that double majors are more likely to work in jobs that require a diverse set of skills and knowledge and are less likely to work in occupations that are closely related to their majors.
32095.zh_abstract: 我们研究了以双专业形式存在的人力资本多样化如何影响收入对劳动力市场冲击的反应。双专业者经历了显著的收入冲击保护，幅度达56%。这一发现在不同的模型设定和数据集下均成立。此外，当两个专业关联度较低时，双专业者所经历的保护更为显著，凸显了多样化技能组合的重要性。进一步分析表明，双专业者更有可能从事需要多样化技能和知识的工作，而不太可能从事与其专业密切相关的职业。

32094.title: Non-Linear Inflation Dynamics in Menu Cost Economies
32094.zh_title: 菜单成本经济中的非线性通胀动态
32094.authors: Andres Blanco, Corina Boar, Callum J. Jones, Virgiliu Midrigan
32094.abstract: Canonical menu cost models, when parameterized to match the micro-price data, cannot reproduce the extent to which the fraction of price changes increases with inflation. They also predict implausibly large menu costs and misallocation in the presence of strategic complementarities. We resolve these shortcomings by extending the multi-product menu cost model along two dimensions. First, the products sold by a firm are imperfect substitutes. Second, strategic complementarities are at the firm, not product level. In contrast to standard models, the fraction of price changes increases rapidly with the size of monetary shocks, so our model implies a non-linear Phillips curve.
32094.zh_abstract: 经典的菜单成本模型在参数化以匹配微观价格数据时，无法再现价格变动比例随通胀上升而增加的程度。在存在战略互补性的情况下，这些模型还预测了不切实际的高菜单成本和资源错配。我们通过沿两个维度扩展多产品菜单成本模型来解决这些缺陷。首先，企业销售的产品是不完全替代品。其次，战略互补性存在于企业层面，而非产品层面。与标准模型相比，价格变动比例随货币冲击规模迅速增加，因此我们的模型意味着非线性的菲利普斯曲线。

32093.title: Maternal Cash Transfers for Gender Equity and Child Development: Experimental Evidence from India
32093.zh_title: 针对性别平等和儿童发展的母亲现金转移：来自印度的实验证据
32093.authors: Jeffrey Weaver, Sandip Sukhtankar, Paul Niehaus, Karthik Muralidharan
32093.abstract: Cash transfer programs to women in India now reach over 130 million beneficiaries at an annual cost of 0.6% of GDP, yet evidence on their effects remains limited. We study the impact of unconditional transfers to new mothers in India using a large-scale randomized evaluation. Treated households saw a 9.6–15.5% increase in calorie intake for mothers and children, along with gains in dietary diversity and nutrient consumption. Gender disparities in food consumption narrowed. We find significant gains in children’s functional development. While anthropometric indicators did not improve on average, they may have in areas with better sanitation.
32093.zh_abstract: 印度针对女性的现金转移项目现已覆盖超过1.3亿受益人，年成本占GDP的0.6%，但其效果的证据仍然有限。我们利用一项大规模随机评估研究了印度对新母亲无条件转移的影响。接受干预的家庭中，母亲和儿童的热量摄入增加了9.6%至15.5%，同时膳食多样性和营养素摄入也有所改善。食物消费中的性别差距缩小了。我们发现儿童功能发展有显著改善。虽然人体测量指标平均而言没有改善，但在卫生条件较好的地区可能有所改善。
32093.meta: Programs：CH, DEV；JEL：D13, I12, I15, I38, O15, Q53

32092.title: Convenience Yields and Exchange Rate Puzzles
32092.zh_title: 便利收益率与汇率谜题
32092.authors: Zhengyang Jiang, Arvind Krishnamurthy, Hanno Lustig, Jialu Sun
32092.abstract: We introduce safe asset demand for dollar-denominated bonds into a tractable incomplete-market model of exchange rates. The convenience yield on dollar bonds enters as a stochastic wedge in the Euler equations for exchange rate determination. This wedge reduces the pass-through from marginal utility shocks to exchange rate movements, resolving the exchange rate volatility puzzle. The wedge also exposes the dollar's exchange rate to convenience yield shocks, giving rise to exchange rate disconnect from macro fundamentals and a quantitatively important driver of currency risk premium. This endogenous exposure identifies a novel safe-asset-demand channel by which the Fed's QE impacts the dollar and long-term U.S. Treasury bond yields.
32092.zh_abstract: 我们将对美元计价债券的安全资产需求引入一个易于处理的不完全市场汇率模型。美元债券的便利收益率作为随机楔子进入汇率决定的欧拉方程。这个楔子减少了边际效用冲击对汇率变动的传导，解决了汇率波动性谜题。该楔子还使美元汇率暴露于便利收益率冲击，导致汇率与宏观基本面脱节，并成为货币风险溢价的一个数量上重要的驱动因素。这种内生暴露识别出一个新颖的安全资产需求渠道，美联储的量化宽松通过该渠道影响美元和长期美国国债收益率。

32091.title: Power Flows: Transmission Lines, Allocative Efficiency, and Corporate Profits
32091.zh_title: 电力流动：输电线路、配置效率与企业利润
32091.abstract: Accelerated investment in electricity transmission could reduce total costs and enhance renewable integration. I document static allocative inefficiencies induced by incomplete market integration in two major U.S. markets; these have risen over time and totaled $\$2$ billion in 2022. I also argue that estimating firm-level impacts is important, as incumbents may have the power to block new lines and other reforms. I show that four firms would have experienced a collective $\$1.3$ billion drop in net revenues in 2022 had the market been integrated, and there are reports of some of these firms blocking transmission projects.
32091.zh_abstract: 加速电力传输投资可以降低总成本并促进可再生能源整合。我记录了美国两个主要市场中由不完全市场整合引起的静态配置低效率；这些低效率随时间上升，2022年总计达20亿美元。我还认为，估计企业层面的影响很重要，因为现有企业可能有权阻止新线路和其他改革。我表明，如果市场实现整合，四家企业在2022年的净收入合计将减少13亿美元，并且有报告称其中一些企业正在阻止输电项目。

32090.title: Policy Responses to Tax Competition: An Introduction
32090.zh_title: 应对税收竞争的政策：导论
32090.authors: David R. Agrawal, James M. Poterba, Owen M. Zidar
32090.abstract: This paper catalogues policies that have been deployed by jurisdictions seeking to mitigate the effects of tax competition. There are many instruments in this policy arsenal, since the tax base associated with a particular tax instrument may be affected by multiple policy choices, including some such as capital controls and development incentives that are outside the traditional realm of tax policy. This paper describes sixteen instruments that both federal and sub-federal governments have adopted in an effort to limit tax competition. It classifies them into three groups: those that can be pursued unilaterally, those that require bilateral or multilateral agreement, and those that require action by an external actor such as an overarching government. It also discusses the set of economic responses that are relevant to the evaluation of these policies, and then summarizes new evidence on the impact of a subset of these policy instruments in the United States and several other nations.
32090.zh_abstract: 本文列举了各司法管辖区为减轻税收竞争影响而部署的政策。这一政策工具库中有许多工具，因为特定税收工具对应的税基可能受到多种政策选择的影响，包括一些传统税收政策领域之外的工具，如资本管制和发展激励。本文描述了联邦和次联邦政府为限制税收竞争而采用的十六种工具。将其分为三类：可以单方面推行的工具、需要双边或多边协议的工具，以及需要外部行为者（如上级政府）采取行动的工具。本文还讨论了与这些政策评估相关的一系列经济反应，然后总结了关于其中一部分政策工具在美国及其他几个国家影响的新证据。

32089.title: Customer Data Access and Fintech Entry: Early Evidence from Open Banking
32089.zh_title: 客户数据访问与金融科技进入：来自开放银行的早期证据
32089.authors: Tania Babina, Saleem A. Bahaj, Greg Buchak, Filippo De Marco, Angus K. Foulis, Will Gornall, Francesco Mazzola, Tong Yu
32089.abstract: Open banking (OB) empowers bank customers to share transaction data with fintechs and other banks. 49 countries have adopted OB policies. Consumer trust in fintechs predicts OB policy adoption and adoption spurs investment in fintechs. UK microdata shows that OB enables: i) consumers to access both financial advice and credit; ii) SMEs to establish new fintech lending relationships. In a calibrated model, OB universally improves welfare through entry and product improvements when used for advice. When used for credit, OB promotes entry and competition by reducing adverse selection, but higher prices for costlier or privacy-conscious consumers partially offset these benefits.
32089.zh_abstract: 开放银行赋予银行客户与金融科技公司及其他银行共享交易数据的权力。已有49个国家采用了开放银行政策。消费者对金融科技公司的信任预示着开放银行政策的采用，而采用则刺激了对金融科技公司的投资。英国微观数据显示，开放银行使：i) 消费者能够获得财务建议和信贷；ii) 中小企业能够建立新的金融科技借贷关系。在一个校准模型中，当开放银行用于提供建议时，通过进入和产品改进普遍改善福利。当用于信贷时，开放银行通过减少逆向选择促进进入和竞争，但对成本较高或注重隐私的消费者收取更高价格部分抵消了这些收益。
32089.meta: Programs：CF, IO, LE, ME, PR；JEL：G21, G23, G24, G28, G5, G50, K21, L10, L51, O31, O36, O38, O50

32088.title: Energy Transitions in Regulated Markets
32088.zh_title: 受监管市场中的能源转型
32088.authors: Gautam Gowrisankaran, Ashley Langer, Mar Reguant
32088.abstract: Natural gas has replaced coal as the dominant fuel for U.S. electricity generation. However, utilities in regulated U.S. states have retired coal more slowly than others. We build a structural model of rate-of-return regulation during an energy transition where utilities face tradeoffs between lowering costs and maintaining and using legacy capacity. A regulated utility facing carbon taxes lowers short-run coal generation 48% as much as a cost minimizer would. Thirty years after a sudden energy transition, a cost minimizer has retired 71% more coal capacity than the regulated utility. Alternative regulations may jeopardize affordability and reliability goals during energy transitions.
32088.zh_abstract: 天然气已取代煤炭成为美国发电的主要燃料。然而，美国受监管州的公用事业公司退役燃煤电厂的速度比其他州更慢。我们构建了一个能源转型期间的投资回报率监管的结构模型，其中公用事业公司在降低成本与维持和使用遗留产能之间面临权衡。面临碳税的受监管公用事业公司，其短期燃煤发电量的降幅仅为成本最小化者所能达到降幅的48%。在突发能源转型三十年后，成本最小化者已退役的燃煤产能比受监管公用事业公司多71%。替代性监管措施可能会在能源转型期间危及可负担性和可靠性目标。

32087.title: Constructing Quarterly Chinese Time Series Usable for Macroeconomic Analysis
32087.zh_title: 构建可用于宏观经济分析的季度中国时间序列
32087.authors: Kaiji Chen, Patrick C. Higgins, Tao Zha
32087.abstract: During episodes such as the global financial crisis and the Covid-19 pandemic, China experienced notable fluctuations in its GDP growth and key expenditure components. To explore the primary sources of these fluctuations, we construct a comprehensive dataset of GDP and its components in both nominal and real terms at a quarterly frequency. Applying two SVAR models to this dataset, we uncover the principal drivers of China's economic fluctuations across different episodes. In particular, our findings underscore the distinct impacts of consumption-constrained shocks on household consumption and its various subcomponents throughout the Covid-19 pandemic.
32087.zh_abstract: 在全球金融危机和新冠疫情等时期，中国的GDP增长及其主要支出组成部分经历了显著波动。为了探究这些波动的主要来源，我们构建了一个包含名义和实际GDP及其组成部分的季度频率综合数据集。将两个SVAR模型应用于该数据集，我们揭示了中国在不同时期经济波动的主要驱动因素。特别是，我们的研究结果强调了在新冠疫情期间，消费受限冲击对家庭消费及其各个子组成部分的独特影响。

32086.title: The Economic Impact of Heritable Physical Traits: Hot Parents, Rich Kid?
32086.zh_title: 可遗传身体特征的经济影响：父母貌美，子女富有？
32086.abstract: Since the mapping of the human genome in 2004, biologists have demonstrated genetic links to the expression of several income-enhancing physical traits. To illustrate how heredity produces intergenerational economic effects, this study uses one trait, beauty, to infer the extent to which parents’ physical characteristics transmit inequality across generations. Analyses of a large-scale longitudinal dataset in the U.S., and a much smaller dataset of Chinese parents and children, show that a one standard-deviation increase in parents’ looks is associated with a 0.4 standard-deviation increase in their child’s looks. A large data set of U.S. siblings shows a correlation of their beauty consistent with the same expression of their genetic similarity, as does a small sample of billionaire siblings. Coupling these estimates with parameter estimates from the literatures describing the impact of beauty on earnings and the intergenerational elasticity of income suggests that one standard-deviation difference in parents’ looks generates a 0.06 standard-deviation difference in their adult child’s earnings, which amounts to additional annual earnings in the U.S. of about $\$2300$.
32086.zh_abstract: 自2004年人类基因组图谱绘制完成以来，生物学家已经证明了多种能提高收入的生理特征与基因之间的联系。为了说明遗传如何产生代际经济效应，本研究利用“美貌”这一特征，推断父母的身体特征在多大程度上将不平等传递给后代。对美国大规模纵向数据集以及一个规模小得多的中国父母与子女数据集的分析表明，父母外貌每增加一个标准差，其子女的外貌相应增加0.4个标准差。一个包含美国兄弟姐妹的大型数据集显示，他们美貌的相关性与其基因相似性的表达一致，一个小样本的亿万富翁兄弟姐妹数据也支持这一结论。将这些估计值与文献中关于美貌对收入影响以及收入代际弹性的参数估计相结合，结果表明，父母外貌一个标准差的差异会导致其成年子女收入产生0.06个标准差的差异，这相当于在美国每年约2300美元的额外收入。

32085.title: Value Chain Microfinance
32085.abstract: We study the provision of financial services to small firms, consumers, and workers in developing countries as part of value chain relationships: value chain microfinance (VCMF). We first explore how VCMF can both overcome barriers to financial access – including asymmetric information, enforcement, and behavioral biases – and strengthen value chains, but also how it can introduce new challenges. We then review a recent empirical literature at the intersection of value chains and microfinance studying the demand for and effects of VCMF in credit, insurance, and savings markets. We conclude by highlighting promising directions for future work.

32084.title: The Predictive Power of the Term Spread and Financial Variables for Economic Activity across Countries
32084.abstract: In recent years, there has been renewed interest in the moments of the yield curve (or alternatively, the term spread) as a predictor of future economic activity, defined as either recessions, or industrial production growth. In this paper, we re-examine the evidence for this predictor for the United States, other high-income countries, as well as selected emerging market economies (Brazil, India, China, South Africa and South Korea), over the 1995-2023 period. We examine the sensitivity of the results to the addition of financial variables that measure other dimensions of financial conditions both domestically and internationally. Specifically, we account for financial conditions indexes (Arrigoni, et al., 2022), the debt service ratio (Borio, et al., 2020), and foreign term spreads (Ahmed and Chinn, 2023). We find that foreign term spreads and the debt service ratio in many cases yield substantially better predictive power, in terms of in-sample fit using proportion of variance explained. Overall, the predictive power of the yield curve, as well as other financial variables, varies across countries, with particularly little explanatory power in emerging market economies.

32083.title: The Effects of Immigration on Agricultural Development: Brazil in the Age of Mass Migration
32083.zh_title: 移民对农业发展的影响：大规模移民时代的巴西
32083.authors: David Escamilla-Guerrero, Andrea Papadia, Ariell Zimran
32083.abstract: We study the effects of immigration during the Age of Mass Migration (1855-1920) on Brazil's agricultural development in 1920. Instrumenting for a municipality's immigrant share using the interaction of aggregate immigrant inflows and the expansion of Brazil's railway network, we find that a greater share of European immigrants in a municipality led to an increase in farm values. The bulk of the effect was the product of more intense cultivation of land. We also find that it is unlikely that immigration slowed Brazil’s structural transformation. Our results imply that immigration into an emerging agricultural economy can substantially contribute to agricultural development.
32083.zh_abstract: 我们研究了大规模移民时代（1855-1920年）移民对巴西1920年农业发展的影响。利用移民总流入量与巴西铁路网络扩张的交互项作为市政区移民比例的工具变量，我们发现，市政区中欧洲移民比例越高，农场价值越高。这种效应主要源于对土地更集约的耕作。我们还发现，移民不太可能减缓巴西的结构转型。我们的结果表明，移民进入一个新兴农业经济体可以极大地促进农业发展。
32083.meta: Programs：DAE, DEV, LS；JEL：F22, J61, N36, N56, O13, O15, Q15

32082.title: Help for the Heartland? The Employment and Electoral Effects of the Trump Tariffs in the United States
32082.zh_title: 对“心脏地带”的帮助？美国特朗普关税的就业与选举效应
32082.authors: David Autor, Anne Beck, David Dorn, Gordon H. Hanson
32082.abstract: We study the economic and political consequences of the 2018-2019 trade war between the United States, China and other US trade partners at the detailed geographic level, exploiting measures of local exposure to US import tariffs, foreign retaliatory tariffs, and US compensation programs. The trade-war has not to date provided economic help to the US heartland: import tariffs on foreign goods neither raised nor lowered US employment in newly-protected sectors; retaliatory tariffs had clear negative employment impacts, primarily in agriculture; and these harms were only partly mitigated by compensatory US agricultural subsidies. Consistent with expressive views of politics, the tariff war appears nevertheless to have been a political success for the governing Republican party. Residents of regions more exposed to import tariffs became less likely to identify as Democrats, more likely to vote to reelect Donald Trump in 2020, and more likely to elect Republicans to Congress. Foreign retaliatory tariffs only modestly weakened that support.
32082.zh_abstract: 我们在详细的地理层面研究了2018-2019年美国、中国及其他美国贸易伙伴之间贸易战的经济和政治后果，利用了衡量地方对美国进口关税、外国报复性关税以及美国补偿计划暴露程度的指标。迄今为止，贸易战并未为美国“心脏地带”提供经济帮助：对外国商品征收的进口关税既未提高也未降低新受保护部门的美国就业；报复性关税则产生了明显的负面就业影响，主要是在农业领域；而美国补偿性的农业补贴仅部分缓解了这些损害。与政治表达性观点一致，这场关税战对执政的共和党而言似乎仍是一场政治成功。受进口关税影响更大的地区居民，更不可能认同民主党，更可能在2020年投票支持特朗普连任，并且更可能选举共和党人进入国会。外国的报复性关税仅适度削弱了这种支持。

32081.title: Export-Platform FDI: Cannibalization or Complementarity?
32081.zh_title: 出口平台型外商直接投资：替代还是互补？
32081.authors: Pol Antràs, Evgenii Fadeev, Teresa C. Fort, Felix Tintelnot
32081.abstract: We develop a model of export-platform foreign direct investment (FDI) in which final goods are produced only with labor and there are no fixed costs of exporting. We derive a simple condition that determines whether an MNE's plants are substitutes or complements. This condition is shaped by the relative size of (i) the cross-firm elasticity of demand the MNE faces for its goods and (ii) the within-firm elasticity of labor substitution across the MNE's plants. In two extensions of the model, we show that this complementarity is enhanced by firm-level (rather than plant-level) fixed costs of exporting and of sourcing inputs.
32081.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个出口平台型外商直接投资（FDI）模型，其中最终产品仅使用劳动生产，且不存在出口的固定成本。我们推导出一个简单条件，用以判断跨国公司的工厂是替代关系还是互补关系。该条件由以下两个弹性的大小对比决定：（i）跨国公司产品面临的企业间需求弹性，以及（ii）跨国公司各工厂间劳动替代的企业内弹性。在模型的两个扩展中，我们表明，这种互补性因出口和投入品采购的企业层面（而非工厂层面）固定成本而增强。

32080.title: Durables and Size-Dependence in the Marginal Propensity to Spend
32080.zh_title: 耐用品与边际支出倾向的规模依赖性
32080.abstract: Stimulus checks have become an increasingly important policy tool in recent U.S. recessions. How does the households' marginal propensity to spend (MPX) vary as checks become larger? To quantify this size-dependence in the MPX, we augment a canonical model of durable spending by introducing a smooth adjustment hazard. We discipline this hazard by matching a rich set of micro moments. We find that the MPX declines slowly with the size of checks. In contrast, the MPX is flatter in a purely state-dependent model of durables, and declines sharply in a two-asset model of non-durables. Finally, we embed our spending model into an open-economy heterogeneous-agent New-Keynesian model. In a typical recession, a large check of $\$2,000$ increases output by 25 cents per dollar, compared to 37 cents for a $\$300$ check. Large checks thus remain effective but extrapolating from the response out of small checks overestimates their impact.
32080.zh_abstract: 刺激支票已成为近期美国经济衰退中日益重要的政策工具。随着支票金额增大，家庭的边际支出倾向（MPX）如何变化？为了量化MPX的这种规模依赖性，我们通过引入平滑调整概率来扩展一个经典的耐用品支出模型。我们通过匹配一组丰富的微观矩来校准这一调整概率。我们发现，MPX随支票金额增大而缓慢下降。相比之下，在纯状态依赖的耐用品模型中，MPX更为平坦；而在非耐用品的双资产模型中，MPX则急剧下降。最后，我们将我们的支出模型嵌入一个开放经济异质性主体新凯恩斯模型中。在一次典型衰退中，一张2000美元的大额支票每美元可增加25美分的产出，而一张300美元的小额支票则为37美分。因此，大额支票仍然有效，但从小额支票的反应进行外推会高估其影响。

32079.title: User Rights for Ocean Ecosystem Conservation
32079.zh_title: 海洋生态系统保护的用户权利
32079.abstract: Non-target marine fish species and ocean ecosystems are increasingly valuable. Ongoing efforts to preserve them emphasize spatial controls on human entry and use via Marine Protected Areas (MPAs). They cover 7.6% of world oceans and aim for 30% by 2030 under the Convention for Biological Diversity (CBD) and International Union for Conservation of Nature (IUCN). MPAs are Pigouvian-style, polluter-pays, controls with rare direct compensation and uncertain projected fishery benefits. Under this policy design, they impose differential economic costs and benefits and likely are inequitable. Absent economic cost/benefit analysis at inauguration, they may be too large, extensive, and restrictive. In the empirical cases below, MPAs are controversial with political pushback, threatening long-term conservation. User rights and Coasean bargaining may avoid some of these outcomes.
32079.zh_abstract: 非目标海洋鱼类物种和海洋生态系统正变得越来越有价值。当前保护它们的努力强调通过海洋保护区（MPA）对人类进入和利用进行空间控制。海洋保护区覆盖了世界海洋面积的7.6%，并根据《生物多样性公约》（CBD）和世界自然保护联盟（IUCN）的目标，到2030年达到30%。海洋保护区是庇古式的、污染者付费的控制措施，很少提供直接补偿，且预计的渔业效益不确定。在这种政策设计下，它们施加了不同的经济成本和收益，并且可能是不公平的。由于在设立时缺乏经济成本/收益分析，它们可能规模过大、范围过广且限制过多。在下面的实证案例中，海洋保护区存在争议并面临政治阻力，威胁到长期保护。用户权利和科斯式谈判可能避免其中一些结果。
32079.meta: Programs：DAE, EEE；JEL：H41, K32, L38, N5, Q22, Q57

32078.title: Happiness Dynamics, Reference Dependence, and Motivated Beliefs in U.S. Presidential Elections
32078.authors: Miles S. Kimball, Collin B. Raymond, Jiannan Zhou, Junya Zhou, Fumio Ohtake, Yoshiro Tsutsui
32078.abstract: Collecting and analyzing panel data over the last four U.S. presidential elections, we study the drivers of self-reported happiness. We relate our empirical findings to existing models of elation, reference dependence, and belief formation. In addition to corroborating previous findings in the literature (hedonic asymmetry/hedonic loss aversion, hedonic adaptation and motivated beliefs), we provide novel results that extend the literature in four dimensions. First, happiness responds to changes relative to both the political status quo (i.e., the incumbent presidential party) and the expected electoral outcome, providing support for two major hypotheses regarding reference point formation. Individuals exhibit hedonic loss aversion to deviations from expectations, but hedonic loss neutrality to changes from the status quo. Second, the speed of hedonic adaptation to deviations from the status quo is significantly slower than the speed of hedonic adaptation to surprises. Third, expectations affect happiness in a nonlinear way, consistent with Gul’s model of disappointment aversion, but contrary to other influential reference-dependent models. Fourth, both “objective” and motivated subjective beliefs matter for the happiness reactions, although subjective beliefs matter more.

32077.title: Diminishing Marginal Utility Revisited
32077.authors: Miles S. Kimball, Daniel Reck, Fudong Zhang, Fumio Ohtake, Yoshiro Tsutsui
32077.abstract: How quickly does marginal utility fall with increasing consumption? It depends on the dimension along which we consider concavity of the utility function. This paper estimates the distribution of heterogeneous curvature parameters in individuals’ utility functions from hypothetical choice data, while accounting for survey response error. Types of curvature examined include relative risk aversion, intertemporal substitution, the reciprocal of the altruism elasticity, and a new measure of inequality aversion, which queries how much more a dollar means to a poor family than to a rich family. \nMedian values of curvature parameters ranging from 0.6 to 13.2. Utility functions are most concave for situations involving altruism, followed by risk aversion, inequality aversion, and intertemporal substitution. Heterogeneity of curvature in the population also varies: altruism is the most heterogeneous, followed by risk aversion, the elasticity of intertemporal substitution, and inequality aversion. Nonetheless, curvature parameters are highly correlated (ρ > .8) over different elicitations within parameter type, and modestly correlated across dimensions in some cases, including inequality aversion and risk aversion (ρ ≈ 0.3), altruism and risk aversion (ρ ≈ 0.3), and altruism and inequality aversion (ρ ≈ 0.14).
32077.zh_abstract: 边际效用随消费增加而下降的速度有多快？这取决于我们考虑效用函数凹性的维度。本文利用假设性选择数据，在考虑调查响应误差的同时，估计了个人效用函数中异质性曲率参数的分布。考察的曲率类型包括相对风险厌恶、跨期替代、利他弹性的倒数，以及一种新的不平等厌恶度量，该度量询问一美元对贫困家庭比对富裕家庭意味着多少。曲率参数的中位数在0.6到13.2之间。效用函数在涉及利他主义的情境中最凹，其次是风险厌恶、不平等厌恶和跨期替代。曲率在人群中的异质性也有所不同：利他主义异质性最大，其次是风险厌恶、跨期替代弹性和不平等厌恶。尽管如此，在参数类型内部的不同诱导方式下，曲率参数高度相关（ρ > 0.8），并且在某些维度之间适度相关，包括不平等厌恶与风险厌恶（ρ ≈ 0.3）、利他主义与风险厌恶（ρ ≈ 0.3），以及利他主义与不平等厌恶（ρ ≈ 0.14）。
32077.meta: Programs：AG, AP, EFG, PE；JEL：D01, D03, D15, D19

32099.title: Platform Information Provision and Consumer Search: A Field Experiment
32099.zh_title: 平台信息提供与消费者搜索：一项实地实验
32099.authors: Lu Fang, Yanyou Chen, Chiara Farronato, Zhe Yuan, Yitong Wang
32099.abstract: Despite substantial efforts to help consumers search in more intuitive ways, text search remains the predominant tool for product discovery online. In this paper, we explore the effects of visual and textual cues for search refinement on consumer search and purchasing behavior. We collaborate with one of the largest e-commerce platforms in China and study its roll out of a new search tool. When a customer searches for a general term (e.g., “headphones”), the tool suggests refined queries (e.g., “bluetooth headphones” or “noise-canceling headphones”) with the help of images and texts. The search tool was rolled out with a long-run experiment, which allows us to measure its short-run and long-run effects. We find that, although there was no immediate effect on orders or total expenditures, the search tool changed customers’ search and purchasing behavior in the long-run. Customers with access to the new tool eventually increased orders and expenditures compared to those in the control group, especially for non top-selling products. The purchase increase comes from more effective searches,
32099.zh_abstract: 尽管在帮助消费者以更直观的方式搜索方面做出了巨大努力，文本搜索仍然是线上产品发现的主要工具。在本文中，我们探讨了用于搜索细化的视觉和文本线索对消费者搜索和购买行为的影响。我们与中国最大的电子商务平台之一合作，研究了其新搜索工具的推出。当客户搜索一个通用术语（例如“耳机”）时，该工具借助图片和文本建议细化的查询（例如“蓝牙耳机”或“降噪耳机”）。该搜索工具通过一项长期实验推出，这使我们能够衡量其短期和长期影响。我们发现，尽管对订单或总支出没有立即影响，但该搜索工具在长期内改变了客户的搜索和购买行为。与对照组相比，使用新工具的客户最终增加了订单和支出，尤其是对于非畅销产品。购买量的增加源于更有效的搜索。
32099.meta: Programs：IO, PR；JEL：D81, D83, L2, L81, L86

32098.title: The Causal Effects of Global Supply Chain Disruptions on Macroeconomic Outcomes: Evidence and Theory
32098.zh_title: 全球供应链中断对宏观经济结果的因果影响：证据与理论
32098.authors: Xiwen Bai, Jesús Fernández-Villaverde, Yiliang Li, Francesco Zanetti
32098.abstract: We study the causal effects and policy implications of global supply chain disruptions. We construct a new index of supply chain disruptions from the mandatory automatic identification system data of container ships, developing a novel spatial clustering algorithm that determines real-time congestion from the position, speed, and heading of container ships in major ports around the globe. We develop a model with search frictions between producers and retailers that links spare productive capacity with congestion in the goods market and the responses of output and prices to supply chain shocks. The co-movements of output, prices, and spare capacity yield unique identifying restrictions for supply chain disturbances that allow us to study the causal effects of such disruptions. We document how supply chain shocks drove inflation during 2021 but that, in 2022, traditional demand and supply shocks also played an important role in explaining inflation. Finally, we show how monetary policy is more effective in taming inflation after a global supply chain shock than in regular circumstances.
32098.zh_abstract: 我们研究了全球供应链中断的因果影响和政策含义。我们利用集装箱船的强制性自动识别系统数据构建了一个新的供应链中断指数，开发了一种新颖的空间聚类算法，该算法根据全球主要港口集装箱船的位置、速度和航向确定实时拥堵情况。我们建立了一个包含生产者和零售商之间搜索摩擦的模型，将闲置生产能力与商品市场拥堵以及产出和价格对供应链冲击的反应联系起来。产出、价格和闲置产能的共同变动为供应链扰动提供了独特的识别限制，使我们能够研究此类中断的因果影响。我们记录了供应链冲击如何在2021年推动通胀，但在2022年，传统的需求和供给冲击在解释通胀方面也发挥了重要作用。最后，我们展示了在全球供应链冲击后，货币政策在抑制通胀方面比正常情况下更有效。

32097.title: Optimal Trade Policy with International Technology Diffusion
32097.zh_title: 国际技术扩散下的最优贸易政策
32097.authors: Yan Bai, Keyu Jin, Dan Lu, Hanxi Wang
32097.abstract: We study optimal dynamic trade policies in an Eaton-Kortum model with technology diffusion through trade. The process of innovation and diffusion is one in which new ideas are combined with insights from others. Trade thus affects technology by determining the distribution from which producers draw their insights. Our theory shows that optimal policies capture a dynamic motive for a country to alter global technology. These policies take into account selection effects, country endowments, and other alterations to trade patterns that affect the degree and quality of diffusion. We provide explicit formulas showing that a Home country would like to subsidize imports from places that improve the quality of learning at Home; or lower its export tax to another country if a) higher productivity in that country is good for the Home, and b) more exports to that country improve the quality of learning and, in turn, the country’s technology. We also calibrate the model using cross-country data and quantify dynamic trade policies and their attendant welfare implications.
32097.zh_abstract: 我们在一个包含通过贸易进行技术扩散的Eaton-Kortum模型中研究最优动态贸易政策。创新与扩散的过程是一个新思想与他人见解相结合的过程。因此，贸易通过决定生产者获取见解的分布来影响技术。我们的理论表明，最优政策捕捉了一个国家改变全球技术的动态动机。这些政策考虑了选择效应、国家禀赋以及对影响扩散程度和质量的贸易模式的其他改变。我们提供了明确的公式，表明本国希望补贴从那些能提高本国学习质量的地方的进口；或者降低对另一个国家的出口税，如果a) 该国的更高生产率对本国有利，并且b) 对该国的更多出口能提高学习质量，进而改善该国的技术。我们还利用跨国数据校准了模型，并量化了动态贸易政策及其相关的福利影响。
